occurrence_sentence: Rigetti Computing Wins $8.6 million DARPA Grant to Demonstrate Practical Quantum Computing

interaction_phrase: received up to $8.6 million from the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency
occurrence_sentence: Rigetti Computing, a pioneer in hybrid quantum-classical computing systems, received up to $8.6 million from the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA) to develop a full-stack system with proven quantum advantage for solving real world problems, according to a news release.

interaction_phrase: received up to $8.6 million from the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency
occurrence_sentence: Rigetti Computing, a pioneer in hybrid quantum-classical computing systems, received up to $8.6 million from the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA) to develop a full-stack system with proven quantum advantage for solving real world problems, according to a news release.

"We're honored to be chosen by DARPA and believe we are uniquely positioned to demonstrate quantum advantage for this class of problem," said Mandy Birch, Senior Vice President, Engineering Strategy at Rigetti.

"We're honored to be chosen by DARPA and believe we are uniquely positioned to demonstrate quantum advantage for this class of problem," said Mandy Birch, Senior Vice President, Engineering Strategy at Rigetti.
The grant is part of the DARPA ONISQ (Optimization with Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum) program.
Rigetti Computing wins 8.6 million DARPA grant to demonstrate practical quantum computing.

interaction_phrase: worked as a science communicator for an R1 university
occurrence_sentence: With a several-decades long background in journalism and communications, Matt Swayne has worked as a science communicator for an R1 university for more than 12 years, specializing in translating high tech and deep tech for the general audience.
